meta.title: Terms of Service — Vela
meta.description: The terms and conditions governing your use of Vela.

hero.p: These are the rules for using Vela. We've written them in plain language because we think you deserve to understand what you're agreeing to.

agreement.p1: By downloading or using Vela, you agree to these Terms of Service. If you don't agree, please don't use the app.
agreement.p2: These terms apply to all versions of Vela, including the iOS app and any web properties operated by Vela Inc. ("Vela", "we", "us").
agreement.p3: We may update these terms from time to time. We'll notify you of significant changes via email or in-app notification. Continued use after changes means you accept the updated terms.

account.p1: You must be at least 13 years old to use Vela. By creating an account, you confirm that you meet this requirement.
account.p2: You're responsible for keeping your account credentials secure. Don't share your password. If you suspect unauthorised access, contact us immediately at support@vela.app.
account.p3: You may only create one account per person. Accounts are non-transferable.

content.p1: You own everything you write in your journal. Vela does not claim ownership of your entries.
content.p2: By using Vela, you grant us a limited licence to process your journal content for the sole purpose of providing the AI companion service. This licence does not extend to sharing, selling, or publishing your content.
content.p3: You are responsible for the content you create. Don't use Vela to store or transmit anything illegal, harmful, or that violates others' rights.

items.reverse: Attempt to reverse-engineer, decompile, or extract source code from Vela.
items.scrape: Use automated tools to scrape, crawl, or extract data from Vela.
items.access: Attempt to gain unauthorised access to Vela's systems or other users' accounts.
items.unlawful: Use Vela for any unlawful purpose or in violation of any applicable laws.
items.impersonate: Impersonate any person or entity, or misrepresent your affiliation with any person or entity.

use.p2: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate these rules.

subscription.p1: Vela offers a free tier and paid subscription plans (Seeker and Founder). Paid subscriptions are billed through the Apple App Store.
subscription.p2: Subscriptions automatically renew unless cancelled at least 24 hours before the end of the current billing period. To cancel, go to your Apple ID subscription settings.
subscription.p3: We do not offer refunds directly — refund requests are handled by Apple via reportaproblem.apple.com.
subscription.p4: We reserve the right to change subscription pricing with reasonable notice. Price changes will not affect your current billing period.

ip.p1: Vela, its logo, design, and all content created by us (readings, UI, copy) are owned by Vela Inc. and protected by copyright and trademark law.
ip.p2: You may not reproduce, distribute, or create derivative works from Vela's content without our written permission.

disclaimer.p1: Vela is provided for personal reflection and entertainment purposes. Astrological readings are not a substitute for professional advice — medical, psychological, financial, or legal.
disclaimer.p2: We make no guarantees about the accuracy of astrological interpretations. The stars are a language, not a certainty.
disclaimer.p3: Vela is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. We are not liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of the app.

termination.p1: You may delete your account at any time from Settings → Account → Delete Account.
termination.p2: We may suspend or terminate your account if you violate these terms, with or without notice depending on the severity of the violation.
termination.p3: Upon termination, your right to use Vela ends immediately. Your data will be deleted in accordance with our Privacy Policy.

contact.p1: Questions about these terms? We're happy to explain anything in plain language.

items.post: Post: Vela Inc., 340 Pine Street, Suite 800, San Francisco, CA 94104

contact.p2: These terms are governed by the laws of the State of California, United States.
